requirement_topic.en: ERC / DOE Net-Metering and Distributed Renewable Energy Connection
requirement_topic.zh: ERC / DOE 净计量与分布式可再生能源接入
requirement_topic.zht: ERC / DOE 淨計量與分散式再生能源接入

summary.en: The Renewable Energy Act establishes net-metering for qualified end-users and requires distribution utilities to enter into net-metering agreements with qualified customers under rules issued by the Energy Regulatory Commission. For inverter exports, the compliance issue is not only product safety: the project package must support the customer's ERC / DOE / distribution-utility interconnection review, metering arrangement, anti-islanding evidence, protection settings, single-line diagram, and commissioning records.
summary.zh: 《可再生能源法》为合格终端用户建立净计量制度，并要求配电公司按照能源监管委员会发布的规则与合格客户签订净计量协议。对逆变器出口而言，合规问题不仅是产品安全：项目资料包还必须支持客户的 ERC / DOE / 配电公司并网审查、计量安排、防孤岛证据、保护参数、单线图和调试记录。
summary.zht: 《再生能源法》為合格終端用戶建立淨計量制度，並要求配電公司按照能源監管委員會發布的規則與合格客戶簽訂淨計量協議。對逆變器出口而言，合規問題不僅是產品安全：專案資料包還必須支持客戶的 ERC / DOE / 配電公司併網審查、計量安排、防孤島證據、保護參數、單線圖和調試記錄。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 9513, Renewable Energy Act of 2008
ERC net-metering rules for qualified end-users
DOE renewable energy net-metering implementation guidance

summary.en: China grid-connected PV inverter documentation commonly includes GB/T grid-support and anti-islanding evidence, Chinese nameplate data, and 50 Hz grid settings. That documentation helps technically, but it must be translated into the Philippine project context and cannot replace the customer-side net-metering agreement, distribution-utility approval, or ERC / DOE documentation route.
summary.zh: 中国并网光伏逆变器文件通常包括 GB/T 并网支持和防孤岛证据、中文铭牌数据以及 50 Hz 电网参数。此类文件在技术上有帮助，但必须转换到菲律宾项目语境，不能替代客户侧净计量协议、配电公司批准或 ERC / DOE 文件路径。
summary.zht: 中國併網光伏逆變器文件通常包括 GB/T 併網支持和防孤島證據、中文銘牌資料以及 50 Hz 電網參數。此類文件在技術上有幫助，但必須轉換到菲律賓專案語境，不能替代客戶側淨計量協議、配電公司批准或 ERC / DOE 文件路徑。

gap.en: The exporter should provide Philippine-ready grid-interconnection documents, not just a factory test report. Typical gaps include local 60 Hz settings, anti-islanding trip data, export-limit functions where requested, wiring and protection drawings, utility application data, and commissioning evidence acceptable to the distribution utility and the qualified end-user's net-metering process.
gap.zh: 出口商应提供适用于菲律宾的并网文件，而不仅是工厂测试报告。常见差距包括当地 60 Hz 参数、防孤岛跳闸数据、被要求时的限发功能、接线和保护图纸、公用事业申请数据，以及配电公司和合格终端用户净计量流程可接受的调试证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應提供適用於菲律賓的併網文件，而不僅是工廠測試報告。常見差距包括當地 60 Hz 參數、防孤島跳閘資料、被要求時的限發功能、接線和保護圖紙、公用事業申請資料，以及配電公司和合格終端用戶淨計量流程可接受的調試證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for customer projects using Philippine net-metering or distribution-utility interconnection; not a standalone factory product certificate
mandatory_status.cn: Project-specific for Chinese interconnection; Chinese factory evidence is supporting documentation only for Philippine net-metering

source.publisher: The Lawphil Project / Philippine legal text of Republic Act No. 9513

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Philippine net-metering is a project and customer-utility pathway. A China factory certificate does not close ERC / DOE / distribution-utility interconnection review unless the inverter evidence is packaged for the Philippine net-metering file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾净计量是项目及客户-公用事业公司路径。除非逆变器证据已整理为菲律宾净计量资料包，否则中国工厂证书不能完成 ERC / DOE / 配电公司并网审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓淨計量是專案及客戶-公用事業公司路徑。除非逆變器證據已整理為菲律賓淨計量資料包，否則中國工廠證書不能完成 ERC / DOE / 配電公司併網審查。
